prompt: Create a premium vertical 9:16 anime-style portrait of Tsuki, a beautiful young woman standing in a traditional Japanese wind chime market or shrine corridor during summer. She has deep tan skin, very long flowing pastel pink hair, vivid magenta-pink eyes, a soft confident smile, and elegant feminine features. She wears an ornate dark purple-black floral kimono with translucent wide sleeves, pink cherry blossom patterns, subtle gold linework, purple trim, and a white inner collar. Add a luxurious black obi belt with gold cords, pearl strands, purple tassels, and a decorative knot at the waist. Include one large purple-and-gold floral hair ornament on the right side of her head, with dangling beads and purple tassels, plus matching long earrings. Pose her waist-up to mid-thigh, slightly turned toward the viewer, with one raised hand gently touching or pointing at a blue glass wind chime on the left foreground. Surround her with many hanging glass furin wind chimes in the background and foreground, each with colorful rectangular paper strips; visible designs include blue, clear, pink, and multicolored glass bells with painted cherry blossoms and floral motifs. Set the scene under a wooden roof with warm beams, shelves of glass ornaments in the distance, greenery and sunlight outside, and strong summer backlighting creating glowing rim light through her hair. Use cinematic depth of field, sparkling glass reflections, bokeh highlights, sun-dappled shadows on the walkway, rich jewel-tone colors, ultra-detailed anime rendering, polished character design, delicate fabric texture, glossy glass, and a premium illustration finish. Keep the character consistent and central, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
